changes: in13 spread note: reverted to A-15-style — removed widow/sole-earner example

— 'Completely agree (A) = absolute conviction with no exceptions'
— 'Somewhat agree (B) = traditional principle applied with judgment in real-life situations'

analysis.in13: Recovered from A-19's 72% to ~79.5% — removal of widow example and restored absolute-vs-contextual framing worked. B came down from 70% to more calibrated range. Did NOT fully recover to A-18's ~93% because examples were gone but the B-legitimacy framing from A-19 may have lingered in personas' logic.
analysis.in09: Still structurally limited — A-overshoot persists (A=62-65% vs Pew 42%). 13 opposition-leaning personas (32.5%) creating C floor; A-overshoot from bjp_supporters despite trust 0.72.
analysis.in07: Still limited — 23 pro-BJP personas (57.5%) create near-majority A. bjp_lean democratic narrative not yet implemented.
analysis.session_best: 83.8% — highest score of the session. Structural ceiling at ~84% identified: in09/in07 are pool-composition limited, not prompt-engineering limited.
analysis.structural_ceiling_identified: Breaking through 84% requires pool recomposition to reduce opposition-lean count (fixes in09 C-overshoot) or reduce bjp_supporter count (fixes in07/in04 — but risks in02/in03 regression).
